network_summary: Dr. Anita Shahin DDS (Howard University Dental School 1997) is the individual dentist-owner of at least three Chicago GP offices operating under distinct local trade names: Andersonville Dental (1700 W Foster Ave, 60640), Armitage Denhal/Armitage Dental (4235 W Armitage Ave, 60639), and Laramie Dental (2556 N Laramie Ave, 60639). No MSO, management-company, DSO brand, PE sponsor, or external platform layer was found. The Andersonville Dental website explicitly states 'Dr. Anita Shahin is the proud owner' and she is an ADA/ISDS/CDS member in solo-practitioner standing. This is a classic dentist-owned multi-office private group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Anita Shahin DDS; Howard University Dental School graduate 1997; licensed Illinois; ADA/ISDS/CDS member; explicit owner of Andersonville Dental per practice website; appears on NPPES as authorized official for all three NPIs.
durable_artifacts: NPPES authorized_official='ANITA SHAHIN' on NPI 1811093248 (Andersonville Dental, 60640), NPI 1629173430 (Armitage Denhal, 60639), NPI 1275737207 (Laramie Dental, 60639)
andersonvilledental.com states 'Dr. Anita Shahin, proud owner of Andersonville Dental which opened in 1998'
Healthgrades lists Dr. Anita Shahin at both Andersonville Dental (1700 W Foster, 60640) and Armitage Denhal (4235 W Armitage, 60639)
Multiple physician directories (WebMD, DentalInsider, dentalplans.com) associate Dr. Shahin with Laramie Dental at 2556 N Laramie Ave, 60639
Reach spans 2 ZIPs: 60639 (2 offices) and 60640 (1 office)
evidence_chain: AO signal: ANITA SHAHIN appears as authorized official on 3 distinct NPPES org NPIs across 2 Chicagoland ZIPs (60639 x2, 60640 x1). Documentary corroboration: andersonvilledental.com/site/chicago-dentist-60640/ explicitly names Dr. Anita Shahin as 'the proud owner' of Andersonville Dental, established 1998. Healthgrades confirms Dr. Shahin practicing at both Andersonville Dental and Armitage Denhal. Multiple directories associate Dr. Shahin with Laramie Dental at the 60639 address. No MSO, management company, DSO brand, or PE sponsor was found in any source. The evidence converges on a single dentist personally owning all three offices under distinct local trade names.
future_app_notes: Watch for any emerging DSO/MSO affiliation — the pattern of 3 offices across 2 ZIPs under distinct trade names without a branded umbrella is consistent with a dentist quietly building a private group. If any future NPPES update shows a parent_organization or if a management-company entity appears in IL Secretary of State filings under Shahin's name, upgrade to branded_dso. The 'Armitage Denhal' name variant (vs 'Armitage Dental') may be a NPPES data-entry typo — worth flagging for the classifier. No PE or MSO found; confidence high.
